tasks.title: Bootstrap Codex operating foundation
acceptance: Canonical docs exist for overview, PRD, pillars, testing, and architecture
.loop and .codex operating surfaces exist and are populated
Project skills exist and are grounded in current repo truth
tasks.notes: This migration establishes the working foundation without broad gameplay refactors.

tasks.title: Run Studio smoke baseline for the current arcade loop
acceptance: Studio play can start and stop cleanly
The arcade loop boots without immediate blocker errors
Validation notes are recorded in .loop/progress.md
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-04-01. Rojo build passed, Studio MCP play start/stop succeeded, and the arcade loop boot blockers in src/server/init.server.luau and src/client/init.client.luau were fixed. The currently open Studio session still shows legacy chat core-script noise; MagicGourd.rbxlx now switches the place to TextChatService on the next Studio reload.

tasks.title: Verify multiplayer pumpkin ownership and cleanup
acceptance: A second player cannot cash out another player's pumpkin
Player leave cleanup removes owned pumpkins without harming shared systems
Multiplayer regression notes are recorded

tasks.title: Audit remotes, attributes, and trust boundaries
acceptance: Current remotes and replicated attributes are inventoried
Server authority checks are documented against the current source
Any exploit-surface concerns are either fixed or logged as concrete follow-up work

tasks.title: Validate HUD next-step clarity in live Studio play
acceptance: HUD guidance remains readable during heal, plant, break, buy, and slow-recovery beats
Prompt ownership and seed CTA do not fight each other in live play
Any readability tuning is minimal and documented

tasks.title: Retune goblin fairness only if live validation proves confusion
acceptance: Danger-entry hits can be explained clearly by players
Goblin chase reach remains fair near plaza and danger boundaries
Changes stay within current arcade scope

tasks.title: Review runtime prompt density and CTA overlap
acceptance: Plaza, village, and danger route prompts remain readable in dense camera slices
Prompt overlap fixes do not require source-tree reorganization
Validation output records what was observed in Studio

tasks.title: Capture current architecture and PM drift follow-through
acceptance: Canonical docs and PM artifacts still match live source after validation slices
Historical reference docs are clearly separated from active canon
No misleading design-source path drift remains in top-level operator docs

tasks.title: Perform current-loop performance budget review
acceptance: HUD, popup churn, goblin loops, and runtime prop counts are reviewed for current risk
Observed bottlenecks are documented with concrete impact and follow-ups
No speculative optimization pass is started without evidence

tasks.title: Create release-candidate checklist for the arcade baseline
acceptance: Rojo build, doc sync, Studio smoke, and multiplayer fairness checks are assembled into one checklist
Blocked items are reported explicitly instead of being implied
The repo has a repeatable RC review path for the current baseline

tasks.title: Place static Heungbu and Nolbu house assets in the world
acceptance: Heungbu House and Nolbu House are placed under Workspace.Map.PlacedAssets with the planned world-facing composition
Both imported houses are upright, grounded to Y=1.0, and do not require new runtime/server placement logic
Rojo build passes and Studio edit/play checks confirm the houses persist and do not break the current arcade loop readability
tasks.notes: Completed on 2026-04-01 using ASSET_IDS.md house IDs 93969099298348 and 76012677304613. The houses were inserted into Workspace.Map.PlacedAssets, scaled and oriented from the archived house-placement baseline, and persisted into MagicGourd.rbxlx without adding runtime interaction logic.
